case_title: MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC VS. ADRIAN HOUSING COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 HOURS
POS; FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC AS TO DEFENDANT ADRIAN HOUSING COMPANY
